title: Cobblemon: FailSkins
body:

items used in guide above, Updated Gallery in the link above.

</details>

ALL BASE MODELS ARE FROM THE COBBLEMON DEVS,MEGASHOWDOWN DEVS, NAVA'S ZA MEGAS, WAVIMON's INDEEDEE

MEOWSCARADA ANIMATIONS ARE FROM COBBLEMOTION BY LENKAGARI FOR ARSENE MEOWSCARADA

for people that trying to run servers that run similarly to hypixel: read the license, but the tldr is that the skins should be obtained for free with no monetary systems involved to get the skins. If you plan to run your server long term and make profits,I don't recommend using this mod, go commission someone on the cobblemon discord server

Pheromosa Original Model By Me: https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/failsafes-pheromosa!
